name: Phylactery Heart
description: Your spare life. Place in any room — die in a fight and you respawn while the heart lives. Adventurers can hunt and destroy it.

name: Door Lock
description: Place a padlock on a doorway. Adventurers can only pass with a key, or via Rogue lockpick / Barbarian break-down. You must immediately place a Key Chest where adventurers can reach it.

name: Key Chest
description: Holds the key to a specific locked door. Refills at the start of every day.

name: Soul-Bound Beacon
description: A glowing pedestal that empowers every minion in the same room (+30% damage and HP, scales with boss level). You must immediately place a Healing Fountain in another room — adventurers can use it once per day to heal to full.

name: Healing Fountain
description: Heals any adventurer who touches it to full HP — once per day per adventurer. Required as the trade-off for placing a Soul-Bound Beacon.

name: Treasure Chest T1
description: Tier 1 chest. Pays 10 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 10% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 10% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T2
description: Tier 2 chest. Pays 20 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 17% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 14% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T3
description: Tier 3 chest. Pays 35 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 24% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 19% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T4
description: Tier 4 chest. Pays 55 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 31% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 23% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T5
description: Tier 5 chest. Pays 80 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 38% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 28% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T6
description: Tier 6 chest. Pays 110 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 45% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 32% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T7
description: Tier 7 chest. Pays 145 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 52% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 37% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T8
description: Tier 8 chest. Pays 185 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 59% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 41% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T9
description: Tier 9 chest. Pays 230 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 66% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 46% (greedy adventurers always go).

name: Treasure Chest T10
description: Tier 10 chest. Pays 300 gold at the end of each day. If an adventurer opens it, they steal 75% of your current gold and may try to escape with it. Tempt chance: 50% (greedy adventurers always go).
